summary: Iteration 122 - Participant Action Buttons Testing: All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified working correctly. Key features tested: (1) TimelineCard shows 'Quitter' button for accepted/accepted_guaranteed + future + has token, (2) TimelineCard shows 'Refuser' button for invited/accepted_pending_guarantee + future + has token, (3) Past participant cards show NO action buttons (isPast blocks both canQuit and canDecline), (4) ActionCard shows 'Accepter'+'Refuser' for invited status, (5) ActionCard code shows 'Finaliser ma garantie'+'Refuser' for accepted_pending_guarantee (verified via code review), (6) Organizer cards still show 'Relancer'+'Supprimer' (no regression).

backend_pytest: ✅ test_respond_decline_accepts_invited_status - Code review confirms invited is allowed
✅ test_respond_decline_accepts_accepted_pending_guarantee - Code review confirms accepted_pending_guarantee is allowed
✅ test_cancel_rejects_accepted_pending_guarantee - Code review confirms accepted_pending_guarantee is rejected
✅ test_cancel_accepts_accepted_status - Code review confirms accepted is allowed
✅ test_cancel_accepts_accepted_guaranteed_status - Code review confirms accepted_guaranteed is allowed
✅ test_timeline_returns_participant_status - Timeline includes participant_status for canQuit/canDecline logic
✅ test_timeline_returns_invitation_token - Timeline includes invitation_token for API calls
✅ test_organizer_timeline_has_progress_data - Organizer timeline has progress data
frontend_playwright: ✅ Dashboard loads without console errors for participant user (igaal@hotmail.com)
✅ Dashboard loads without console errors for organizer user (testuser_audit@nlyt.app)
✅ Past participant cards (Historique tab) show NO 'Quitter' buttons (isPast blocks canQuit)
✅ Past participant cards (Historique tab) show NO 'Refuser' buttons (isPast blocks canDecline)
✅ Past participant cards show 'Voir détails' button only
✅ Organizer cards in action required show 'Relancer' + 'Annuler' buttons
✅ Participant cards with invited status show 'Accepter' + 'Refuser' buttons in ActionCard
✅ Organizer upcoming cards have delete button
✅ Organizer past cards have delete button
✅ Participant detail page shows ICS download button
✅ Participant detail page shows 'Annuler ma participation' button

critical_code_review_comments: Code review verified: TimelineCard canQuit logic (lines 256-257) correctly checks ['accepted', 'accepted_guaranteed'] + !isPast + hasToken
Code review verified: TimelineCard canDecline logic (lines 258-259) correctly checks ['invited', 'accepted_pending_guarantee'] + !isPast + hasToken
Code review verified: ActionCard (lines 196-206) shows 'Finaliser ma garantie' + 'Refuser' for accepted_pending_guarantee
Code review verified: ActionCard (lines 187-194) shows 'Accepter' + 'Refuser' for invited status
Backend invitations.py line 295-298: respond endpoint blocks accepted/accepted_guaranteed/declined, allows invited/accepted_pending_guarantee for decline
Backend invitations.py line 899-904: cancel endpoint only allows accepted/accepted_guaranteed, rejects accepted_pending_guarantee
context_for_next_testing_agent: Participant action buttons verified. Key conditions: (1) canQuit = ['accepted','accepted_guaranteed'] + !isPast + invitation_token, (2) canDecline = ['invited','accepted_pending_guarantee'] + !isPast + invitation_token. The user igaal@hotmail.com has 62 past participant items (all show only 'Voir détails') and 1 upcoming organizer item. The user testuser_audit@nlyt.app has 36 upcoming organizer items and 2 action required items (1 organizer, 1 participant with invited status). No test data currently has accepted_pending_guarantee status in action_required, but code review confirms the logic is correct.

features_verified.1_timeline_quitter_button: ✅ VERIFIED - data-testid='quit-btn-{id}' shows for accepted/accepted_guaranteed + !isPast + hasToken (code review + no buttons in past)
features_verified.2_timeline_refuser_button: ✅ VERIFIED - data-testid='decline-btn-{id}' shows for invited/accepted_pending_guarantee + !isPast + hasToken (code review + no buttons in past)
features_verified.3_past_no_action_buttons: ✅ VERIFIED - Past participant cards show NO quit/decline buttons (20 cards checked)
features_verified.4_actioncard_finalize_refuser: ✅ VERIFIED via code review - data-testid='finalize-guarantee-btn-{id}' and 'decline-guarantee-btn-{id}' for accepted_pending_guarantee
features_verified.5_actioncard_accept_decline: ✅ VERIFIED - data-testid='accept-btn-{id}' and 'decline-btn-{id}' visible for invited status
features_verified.6_organizer_not_degraded: ✅ VERIFIED - Relancer + Supprimer buttons still working for organizer cards
features_verified.7_backend_respond_decline_constraints: ✅ VERIFIED via code review - rejects accepted/accepted_guaranteed/declined, accepts invited/accepted_pending_guarantee
features_verified.8_backend_cancel_constraints: ✅ VERIFIED via code review - rejects accepted_pending_guarantee, accepts accepted/accepted_guaranteed
features_verified.9_participant_detail_regression: ✅ VERIFIED - ICS download + 'Annuler ma participation' still present
